mano_cua.result_summary: Swagger UI 正确展示了嵌套对象数组的 Query 参数结构。rawArray 参数显示为 array<object>，展开 Schema 可见子对象包含 foo(string,required) 属性。filter 参数显示为 object 类型，Schema 展示 name(string) 和 age(number) 子属性。letters 参数显示为 array 类型引用 Letter enum(A/B/C)。raw 参数显示为 object 类型含 foo 属性。所有嵌套结构均正确展示，未丢失子属性或类型信息。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All nested object array query parameters are correctly rendered in Swagger UI. rawArray shows as array<object> with proper sub-object schema (foo: string, required). filter shows as object with name(string) and age(number) properties. The parameter structures including sub-object attributes and type information are all correctly displayed.
